[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000001110 3
1 0011110010 5
2 1011100001 5
3 0010111111 7
4 1111011101 8
5 0110110101 6
6 1000100010 3
7 0000000001 1

01 10 0000000000 a
12 21 0000000001 1 match 7
23 32 0000100001 2
34 43 1100000100 3
45 54 0000010100 2
56 65 0010011101 5
67 76 0110010101 5
70 07 0000100000 1

02 20 0000100000 1
13 31 0000000001 1 match 7
24 42 0000010000 1
35 53 0000101111 5
46 64 1101010100 5
57 75 0010110101 5
60 06 1000000000 1
71 17 0000000001 1 match 7

14 41 0000000000 a
25 52 0010110001 4
36 63 1100001101 5
47 74 0100010100 3
50 05 0000100010 2
61 16 0000000001 1 match 7
72 27 0010110001 4

15 51 0000000001 1 match 7
26 62 0010010001 3
37 73 0100100101 4
